description_long: This object is a vintage Commodore Personal Electronic Transactor, featuring a large, boxy CRT monitor integrated into a single unit with a keyboard and control panel. The front face displays a prominent, slightly recessed screen with a thick, black bezel, and a slanted control panel below, which includes a numeric keypad, function keys, and a tape drive. The casing is primarily off-white with a matte finish, and the rear section is vented for cooling, with various ports and labels visible. The sides are plain, showing the angular, geometric design typical of late 1970s and early 1980s computers. The base is black, providing a visual contrast and stability to the unit. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with clear labeling and a robust, industrial build.
description: A vintage Commodore computer monitor with an integrated keyboard, tape drive, and a large, thickly framed CRT display in an off-white, angular casing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CRT screen, thick black bezel, full keyboard, tape drive, and Commodore branding.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular, sloped rear housing and the side profile of the keyboard and screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying ventilation slots, multiple ports, and manufacturer labels on the back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sloped rear and the keyboard's side profile, mirroring the left side.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The screen bezel is thick, black, and rectangular with sharp corners, made of matte plastic, and contrasts strongly with the off-white casing. It is plain with no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor is supported by an integrated flat base that is part of the main housing, extending beneath the keyboard and screen, made of sturdy plastic with no visible adjustability.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are located on the left side of the control panel below the screen, grouped together above the tape drive.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the rear panel, with multiple ports and connectors accessible from the back.
attribute_brand_logo: A Commodore logo and model label are present on the front panel above the keyboard, in white text on a black background.
